# Bitcoin Plunges to $62K on Fed Risk-Off sentiment.

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | July 08, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.

## ⚡ Why This Matters (The Macro View)
While most outlets report the 'what', our intelligence engine focuses on the 'why'. This development in Crypto isn't just a news item; it's a structural pivot. 

## ⚖️ The Contrarian Perspective
